channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Lagos can’t rival world-class cities without disciplined citizens – Sanwo-Olu

item.description:
Governor Sanwo-Olu emphasizes that Lagos’s ambition to be a world-class city hinges on disciplined citizens respecting public infrastructure and obeying la
Read More: https://punchng.com/lagos-cant-rival-world-class-cities-without-disciplined-citizens-sanwo-olu/

item.description:

item.title: I made up stories about Soludo, son for financial gain – Blogger
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A blogger has issued a public apology and retraction for fabricating stories about Anambra State Governor Chukwuma Soludo and his son for financial gain.
Read More: https://punchng.com/i-made-up-stories-about-soludo-son-for-financial-gain-blogger/

item.title: Odumeje Fires Back At Pastor Adeboye Over Tinubu Support In Explosive Outburst
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Popular cleric Prophet Chukwuemeka Ohanaemere, popularly known as Odumeje, has strongly criticized the General Overseer of the Redeemed Christian Church of God (RCCG), Pastor Enoch Adeboye, over his recent comments regarding President Bola Tinubu. The criticism follows a June 23 address delivered by

item.title: Ex-Tinubu aide, Dapo Thomas reveals inside story of Fashola’s emergence in new memoir
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Professor Dapo Thomas has lifted the lid on one of Lagos politics' defining succession stories, revealing in his new autobiography how Babatunde Fashola (SAN) emerged as former Lagos State governor Bola Tinubu's preferred successor despite stiff resistance from influential figures within the then Ac

item.title: First Lady Explains ‘Akara’ Remark, Urges Celebrities To Support Poor Nigerians Nationwide
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s First Lady, Senator Oluremi Tinubu, has defended her widely criticised remarks on empowering women through petty trading, insisting that small businesses remain a viable path to economic independence while calling on top entertainers to use their wealth to support vulnerable Nigerian

item.title: Low Turnout, Late Arrival Of Officials Mar Edo LG Polls, Okpebholo Says Exercise Peaceful
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Low voter turnout and the late arrival of electoral officials and materials characterised Saturday’s local government election in Edo State, even as Governor Monday Okpebholo insisted that the exercise was peaceful and orderly.   Across several polling units in the state&#82

item.title: KADIRS Approves Three New Area Revenue Offices
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The approval is aimed at deepening tax administration, expanding the tax net, and sustaining the remarkable growth in internally generated revenue in the state. The post KADIRS Approves Three New Area Revenue Offices appeared first on Channels Television.

item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Live coverage and updates from our text commentary stream as Messi's Argentina face Switzerland in the quarterfinals.

item.title: Oriire School Abduction: Families Praise Tinubu, Security Agencies Over Victims’ Release
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Families of the rescued victims of the Oriire school abduction have expressed joy over the release of their loved ones, describing their rescue as a huge relief after weeks of anxiety and uncertainty. The families, who spoke with TVC News in Esinele, Yawota and Ahoro-Dada communities in Oriire Local

item.title: 40 Stranded Nigerians return from South Africa to cash gifts, fresh hope
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: According to NiDCOM, the returnees expressed appreciation to President Bola Tinubu for approving their evacuation, as well as to Nigeria's Acting High Commissioner to South Africa, Ambassador Temitope Alexander-Ajayi, for facilitating the process.

item.title: Police arrest four chiefs, others over MACBAN chairman’s death in Benue
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Ardo Mohammad and Yakubu Isa were killed in an ambush by armed men on June 26, 2026, around Okudu community while returning from a peace meeting held in neighbouring Ohimini LGA. The post Police arrest four chiefs, others over MACBAN chairman’s death in Benue appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A few days after two children of former Bauchi State Deputy Governor, Senator Baba Tela, died in a road accident, another tragic crash has claimed seven lives along the same Bauchi-Maiduguri highway on Saturday. The Bauchi State Sector Command of the Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC), RS12.1, confirm

item.title: Remi Tinubu to Davido, Burna Boy, Asake: Use your wealth to lift the poor
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "There was once I read an article about a young graduate who said he didn't get a job. He said he sells akara because he couldn't get a job. We approached him, but I didn't put my name to it. We equipped him more. He now has 12 workers working under him, and he's doing very, very well," she said.

item.title: Modi Courts Indo-Pacific Partners as China, US Reshape Region
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: From missiles and uranium to critical minerals and sports diplomacy, Prime Minister Narendra Modi used a three-nation tour to deepen India’s Indo-Pacific partnerships as regional powers strengthen ties amid China’s growing influence and uncertainty over US engagement.

item.dc:creator: Daily Trust

The final match, played at the Asaba Stadium in Delta State, saw the Lafia Landladies clinch t

He said the former Anambra State governor would be alive to contest the election and suffer another defeat at the polls. Umahi spoke while inspecting ongoing fed

Reacting to the news, FIFA President Gianni Infantino, in a statement, said Adams would be sorely missed. “It&#821

Her style celebration features a traditional Northern-inspired look, a beaded blue mermaid gown, a regal purple sequinned dress, and structured mini dresses paired with reflections on her personal growth. item.title: Naira records fresh decline, trades at N1,381/$
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The Nigerian naira lost value against the United States dollar at the official foreign exchange market during the week ending July 10, 2026, despite an increase in the country’s foreign reserves. According to data from the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), the naira closed at N1,381.70 per dollar

This the presidency said is in a major boost to the country’s technical education sector and efforts to harness Nigeria’s v

item.title: Former Chelsea chairman Ken Bates dies at 94

item.description: English Premier League club, Chelsea,on Saturday, announced the death of Ken Bates, the club’s former chairman. item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "We appreciate the efforts of all the security agencies in securing the release of our school children and their teachers from captivity. Congratulations to each of them and their families. Our God answers prayers. Hallelujah!!!" the statement added.

item.title: Show HN: Ant – A JavaScript runtime and ecosystem
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Hello HN!I'm the author of Ant, a JavaScript ecosystem built around a runtime with its own JavaScript engine. Ant also includes a package manager, the ants.land package registry, a platform for deploying and hosting applications, and Ant Desktop for building native desktop apps with web technologies

item.title: Gloria Young Is Tired Of Your Streams: Why Nollywood’s Original ‘Senior Girl’ Wants You To Close That App
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: "Sitting down and watching a stage play is not the same thing as watching it on television. The thrill is just not there... Truly, if you want to pass a strong message, use a stage performance." The post Gloria Young Is Tired Of Your Streams: Why Nollywood’s Original ‘Senior Girl’ Wants

item.title: Wike steps in as AEDC moves to restore power after Maitama substation invasion
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: According to the electricity distribution company, Wike has been fully briefed on the circumstances surrounding the invasion of the critical power facility and is working with relevant authorities to ensure electricity is restored as quickly as possible.

item.title: Eno, PDP spokesperson, others celebrate ex-Gov Emmanuel at 60
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Mr Emmanuel turned 60 on Saturday, drawing glowing tributes from former aides, a PDP factional spokesperson and supporters, who praised his leadership, humility and enduring influence. The post Eno, PDP spokesperson, others celebrate ex-Gov Emmanuel at 60 appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Warsh and US Inflation Will Set Tone for July Fed Decision
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Kevin Warsh is about to make his first appearance before Congress as Federal Reserve chairman, and during two days of testimony he’ll have new US inflation data to parse with lawmakers.

item.title: McIlroy loses ground as fog halts play with Fitzpatrick sharing lead
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Rory McIlroy was slipping out of contention as Matt Fitzpatrick took a share of the lead when play was suspended due to fog in the third round of the Genesis Scottish Open.

item.title: Peter Obi will be alive to contest, lose 2027 election — Dave Umahi
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: We all want him alive to contest this election and watch himself lose again,” the minister said. The post Peter Obi will be alive to contest, lose 2027 election — Dave Umahi appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: We’ll honour those who died in Oriire kidnap rescue operation – Makinde
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo has promised to honour the civilians and military personnel who lost their lives in the rescue of Oriire kidnap victims The post We’ll honour those who died in Oriire kidnap rescue operation – Makinde appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Gani Adams Commends Govts, Security Agencies Over Rescue Of Oriire Pupils, Teachers
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Aare Ona Kakanfo of Yorubaland, Iba Gani Adams, has commended the collaborative efforts of the Federal Government, Oyo State Government, security agencies, and Local security groups in the successful rescue of abducted teachers and students from Oriire local government in Ogbomoso, Oyo State. Th

item.title: World Population Day: Radda pledges data-driven development in Katsina
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Katsina State Governor Dikko Radda commits to data-driven development, using accurate population statistics to improve services and transform the youthful
Read More: https://punchng.com/world-population-day-radda-pledges-data-driven-development-in-katsina/

item.title: Dozie Nwankwo Bags National Legislative Excellence Award
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: The APGA Candidate for 2027 Anambra Central Senatorial Election, Hon. Dozie Ferdinand Nwankwo has been honoured with the National Legislative Special Recognition Award of Excellence, in Legislative Development and Democratic

item.title: NRC Investment Platform Collapses, Investors Lose Billions of Naira
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: An online investment platform known as National Reading Culture (NRC) has collapsed, leaving thousands of investors unable to access their funds and reportedly resulting in the loss of billions of naira. The platform, which promised users opportunities to earn money through online activities and inv

item.title: How Mutfwang Is Building Prosperity Around Plateau Potato
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: In the fertile highlands of Plateau State, where cool climates and rich volcanic soils have long made Irish potatoes a staple crop, a deliberate reinvention is taking root. What was

item.title: Presidency Flays Atiku’s Silence Hours After Release of Abducted Oyo Pupils, Teachers
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: .Thumbs up Obi Deji Elumoye in Abuja The Presidency on Saturday blasted former Vice President and presidential candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Alhaji Atiku Abubakar, over his failure

item.title: Oriire Abduction: Makinde to Brief Nigerians Next week
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Kemi Olaitan in Ibadan Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo State, on Saturday, said the pupils and teachers rescuedfrom captivity in Oriire local government area,would remain under close medical observation for
